utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Hi Joey ! What are you doing here ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Uhh , well I have got an audition down the street and I spilled sauce all over the front of my shirt . You got an extra one ?

emotion_cause.span: 2_I spilled sauce all over the front of my shirt .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Great . You got anything that is not Ralph Lauren ?

emotion_cause.span: 4_You got anything that is not Ralph Lauren ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yeah , I do not think so Joe .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: All right , I guess this will be fine .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Hey , listen umm , what ... what are you doing tonight ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: How would you feel about taking out my assistant Tag ? I will pay .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Huh , Rach I got to say it is gonna take a lot of money for me to go out on a date with a dude .

emotion_cause.span: 10_go out on a date with a dude

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I am not asking you to go on a date with him !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Really ? Cause I could kinda use the money .

emotion_cause.span: 11_I am not asking you to go on a date with him !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Joey , just ... just he ... he is new in town and I know he does not have any guy friends .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Just take him to like a ball game or something .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Sure , no problem . Ooh ... Hey , donuts !
